card.name: 2 of Hearts
card.task: TEST SAVE: Find the hidden door and unlock it with the golden key.

card.name: 3 of Hearts
card.task: Heal yourself and recover 3 life points from the fountain.

card.name: 4 of Hearts
card.task: Rest at the inn for 4 turns and regain your strength.

card.name: 5 of Hearts
card.task: Discover a secret garden hidden behind the rose hedge.

card.name: 6 of Hearts
card.task: Share a meal with fellow travelers and gain their trust.

card.name: 7 of Hearts
card.task: Lucky hearts! Take a shortcut through the enchanted maze.

card.name: 8 of Hearts
card.task: Follow the red path north toward the crimson tower.

card.name: 9 of Hearts
card.task: Make a wish at the wishing fountain and draw again.

card.name: 10 of Hearts
card.task: Find the treasure chest hidden in the east wing chamber.

card.name: Jack of Hearts
card.task: The Jack of Hearts guards the northern gate — answer his riddle to pass.

card.name: Queen of Hearts
card.task: The Queen of Hearts offers you safe passage through her domain.

card.name: King of Hearts
card.task: The King of Hearts grants you an extra turn and his blessing.

card.name: Ace of Hearts
card.task: The Ace of Hearts — master of life — teleport to any room in the maze.

card.name: 2 of Diamonds
card.task: Collect 2 gold coins from the treasure room floor.

card.name: 3 of Diamonds
card.task: Find a gem hidden inside the maze wall near the east corridor.

card.name: 4 of Diamonds
card.task: Trade 4 items with another player to unlock the diamond vault.

card.name: 5 of Diamonds
card.task: Discover a diamond vein in the cavern wall — mine it carefully.

card.name: 6 of Diamonds
card.task: Pay 6 coins to the merchant to use the secret elevator.

card.name: 7 of Diamonds
card.task: Lucky diamonds! Double your score this round.

card.name: 8 of Diamonds
card.task: Trade positions with the wealthiest player in the maze.

card.name: 9 of Diamonds
card.task: Unlock the gem-encrusted door with the key you found earlier.

card.name: 10 of Diamonds
card.task: Find the merchant's treasure map leading to the final chamber.

card.name: Jack of Diamonds
card.task: The Jack of Diamonds reveals a hidden path behind the waterfall.

card.name: Queen of Diamonds
card.task: The Queen of Diamonds shows you the shortest route to the exit.

card.name: King of Diamonds
card.task: The King of Diamonds fills your coin purse — gain 5 bonus points.

card.name: Ace of Diamonds
card.task: The Ace of Diamonds — master of wealth — claim the grand prize chest.

card.name: 2 of Clubs
card.task: Follow the forest trail deeper into the ancient woods.

card.name: 3 of Clubs
card.task: Climb the ancient oak tree for a better view of the maze layout.

card.name: 4 of Clubs
card.task: Cross the mossy bridge over the underground stream.

card.name: 5 of Clubs
card.task: Find the druid's clearing and receive ancient wisdom.

card.name: 6 of Clubs
card.task: Gather rare herbs from the forest floor for a healing potion.

card.name: 7 of Clubs
card.task: Lucky clubs! Discover a secret forest path that skips 3 rooms.

card.name: 8 of Clubs
card.task: Lost in the dark forest — retrace your steps and go back 3 spaces.

card.name: 9 of Clubs
card.task: Challenge the forest spirit to a riddle — success grants free passage.

card.name: 10 of Clubs
card.task: Discover the ancient tree-maze entrance carved into the giant oak.

card.name: Jack of Clubs
card.task: The Jack of Clubs opens the forest gate with a secret knock.

card.name: Queen of Clubs
card.task: The Queen of Clubs commands the forest creatures to guide you safely.

card.name: King of Clubs
card.task: The King of Clubs grants you free passage through the dark forest.

card.name: Ace of Clubs
card.task: The Ace of Clubs — master of nature — grow a new path through the maze.

card.name: 2 of Spades
card.task: Dig through the underground tunnel using your trusty spade.

card.name: 3 of Spades
card.task: Find the burial chamber shortcut below the stone floor.

card.name: 4 of Spades
card.task: Unearth a hidden artifact buried beneath the ancient ruins.

card.name: 5 of Spades
card.task: Navigate the dark catacombs without light — trust your instincts.

card.name: 6 of Spades
card.task: Cross the underground river on a crumbling stone bridge.

card.name: 7 of Spades
card.task: Lucky spades! Excavate a secret underground passage to the next level.

card.name: 8 of Spades
card.task: Cave-in! The path collapses — move back 4 spaces to safety.

card.name: 9 of Spades
card.task: Solve the ancient tomb's puzzle to reveal the hidden door.

card.name: 10 of Spades
card.task: Find the underground maze map etched on the catacomb ceiling.

card.name: Jack of Spades
card.task: The Jack of Spades guards the underground realm — prove your worth.

card.name: Queen of Spades
card.task: The Queen of Spades opens the obsidian gate with a gesture of power.

card.name: King of Spades
card.task: The King of Spades commands the underworld — all dark paths open for you.

card.name: Ace of Spades
card.task: The Ace of Spades — master of fate — choose your own destiny in the maze.
